payload.answer: Update Sam’s current employment from Goldman to Point72, and retain Goldman only as a former employer based on the transition statement.
citations: Existing current fact: Sam works at Goldman
New fact: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72

entity_resolution.reason: The new fact refers to the same person, Sam, as the existing current employment fact. No unique entity ID was provided.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.

details: Detected that the new fact supersedes the existing current employment fact.
Avoided presenting the superseded Goldman employment as current.
Preserved Goldman as former employer and Point72 as current employer.

repair_options: Mark the existing fact 'Sam works at Goldman' as superseded/not current.
Add current fact: Sam works at Point72.
Add historical fact: Sam formerly worked at Goldman.
Optionally add transition fact: Sam left Goldman and joined Point72.
